title: I built this game with Hermes using MiniMax M3
summary: David Ondrej built a game using the Hermes system with MiniMax M3 model. MiniMax offers an API platform and token subscription plan for text generation applications.
writeup: This video documents David Ondrej building a game application with the Hermes framework wired to MiniMax M3, a language model from MiniMax. It demonstrates how a model API can drive game development as part of an end to end build. The video also promotes MiniMax's API platform and its token subscription plans for developers.
